query: 我快期中考了,覺得壓力很大, 打算在下午跟朋友一起去看電影, 可不可以給我最新可以舒壓的電影?

results.title: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!
results.overview: Iroha's life gets knocked off its orbit when Kaguya, a carefree runaway from the Moon, moves in and convinces her to perform in a virtual world together.
results.match_reason_text: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!是一部關於Iroha和Kaguya在虛擬世界一起表演的科幻動畫電影。它適合你因為它是一部舒壓的科幻動畫電影，能夠幫助你放鬆壓力。
results.top_pick_text: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!是一部關於Iroha和Kaguya在虛擬世界一起表演的科幻動畫電影。它適合你因為它是一部舒壓的科幻動畫電影，能夠幫助你放鬆壓力。

results.title: KPop Demon Hunters
results.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.
results.match_reason_text: KPop Demon Hunters是一部關於K-pop偶像組合Rumi、Mira和Zoey在日常生活中隱藏超自然能力的奇幻音樂喜劇動畫電影。它適合你因為它是一部輕鬆愉快的動畫電影，能夠幫助你放鬆壓力。

results.title: Big World
results.overview: Liu Chunhe, suffering from cerebral palsy, bravely breaks through the shackles of body and mind to realize the dream stage for his grandmother, while trying to find the coordinates of his own life. After experiencing a summer transformation, he finally embarked on a new journey.
results.match_reason_text: Big World是一部關於Liu Chunhe與其祖母之間的深厚感情的家庭劇情電影。它適合你因為它是一部溫暖感人的電影，能夠幫助你放鬆壓力。

results.title: Lilo & Stitch
results.overview: The wildly funny and touching story of a lonely Hawaiian girl and the fugitive alien who helps to mend her broken family.
results.match_reason_text: Lilo & Stitch is a heartwarming story about a lonely Hawaiian girl and her unlikely friendship with a shape-shifting alien. It fits your request for a warm family movie due to its nostalgic and whimsical tone, making it a perfect choice for a family film.
results.top_pick_text: Lilo & Stitch is a heartwarming story about a lonely Hawaiian girl and her unlikely friendship with a shape-shifting alien. It fits your request for a warm family movie due to its nostalgic and whimsical tone, making it a perfect choice for a family film.

results.title: North to Home
results.overview: Suzanne McBride is excited to spend her birthday with her family. It will be the first time that her three adopted daughters will be together in years. This seems like a great time for a family reunion, but the sisters are each wrestling with unique challenges that threaten to derail this special occasion.
results.match_reason_text: North to Home is a touching drama about a family reunion that explores the unique challenges each sister faces. It fits your request for a warm family movie due to its strong family themes and emotional feel, making it a great choice for a family film.

results.title: Mulan
results.overview: When Imperial China calls one man from every family to defend the empire from invading Huns, a young woman disguises herself as a soldier to take her ailing father’s place. Facing ruthless invaders, brutal training, and the risk of execution if discovered, she must decide who she truly is— and what she’s willing to fight for.
keywords: based on song, poem or rhyme
results.match_reason_text: Mulan is an inspiring adventure about a young woman who disguises herself as a soldier to protect her family. It fits your request for a warm family movie due to its celebratory and joyful tone, making it a great choice for a family film.

results.title: War Machine
results.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.
results.match_reason_text: War Machine is an action-packed sci-fi film about a combat engineer who must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine. It fits your request because it's an action movie with a strong story, matching your requested genre. The film's intense action sequences and thrilling plot will keep you on the edge of your seat.

results.title: Akshardham: Operation Vajra Shakti

results.title: Shelter
results.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.
